text.title: Scope Management Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: RTM row for cart calculator
example.note: FR-01 functional 'System calculates order totals automatically on item add/remove'; priority Must; source 'Sales Manager interview 2026-04-01'; AC 'Order total updates within 200ms with no page reload'; design_ref design/checkout-flow.md#totals; code_ref src/cart/calculator.py; test_ref tests/test_cart.py::test_total_update; status done.
